commands.review_summary:
The branch extends shared `message` send recognition to `upload-file`, `sendAttachment`, and `sendWithEffect`, preserves `threadId` in extracted send evidence, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main gates shared `message` delivery evidence on only `send` and `thread-reply`, while supported attachment-style actions can successfully send media without being committed as delivery evidence. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
